text: You are in a disposable dummy workspace for BreadBoard harness parity testing. This is an inspection/reporting task, not a bug-fix task. Do not search parent directories, do not look for AGENTS.md, and do not touch files outside this directory. Use shell_command exactly once to inspect the workspace with: pwd && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './.breadboard/*' | sort && sed -n '1,80p' notes.md && sed -n '1,80p' src/widget.ts. After that single tool call, stop using tools and answer with first line exactly HARNESS_PARITY_INSPECT_OK, and mention ALPHA_WIDGET and BETA_NOTE. Do not edit files yet.

Now perform one small edit in this same dummy workspace. Do not search parent directories and do not inspect unrelated files. Use shell_command exactly once to run this exact command: printf '%s\n' HARNESS_PARITY_EDIT_FILE ALPHA_WIDGET_CONFIRMED BETA_NOTE_CONFIRMED > agent_notes.md && cat agent_notes.md. After that single tool call, stop using tools and answer with first line exactly HARNESS_PARITY_EDIT_OK and summarize only agent_notes.md.

Verify the edit by using shell_command exactly once to run: pwd && cat agent_notes.md && npm run check. After that single verification tool call, stop using tools and answer with first line exactly HARNESS_PARITY_VERIFY_OK and include dummy-check-ok.
